name: Ersta Table Lamp - 26.5 Inch Height - TBL4367 - Brown - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the ERSTA resin table lamp, a stylish addition measuring 26.5 inches. This lamp blends seamlessly with a variety of interiors, thanks to its elegant brown hue. Crafted from 80 percent resin body and 20 percent iron neck, the ERSTA table lamp offers a harmonious combination of materials that add both charm and function to your home. 

Whether placed on a bedside table or as an accent in your living room, this lamp enhances any room with its inviting glow and contemporary design. The sturdy construction ensures stability while the sleek design creates a focal point that draws attention without overwhelming your decor. Embrace a touch of sophistication with the ERSTA resin table lamp and enjoy the ambiance it brings to your living space.
